eyebrow.zh: 中立 · 一条命令 · 跨客户端

headline.zh:
给任意 MCP server
一张跨客户端一致性矩阵
headline.en:
Any MCP server,
a cross-client conformance matrix

sub.zh: 经 stdio 启动你的 server，跑行为 + Zero-Touch OAuth 校验，输出 client × {behavior, auth} 类型化矩阵与徽章。单个 Node CLI，一个进程。
sub.en: Spawns your server over stdio, runs behavior + Zero-Touch OAuth checks, and emits a typed client × {behavior, auth} matrix plus a badge. One Node CLI, one process.

body.zh: npx mcp-conform run 接「你如何启动自己的 server」整条命令，经 stdio JSON-RPC 起子进程，跑 initialize 握手与 tools/list 校验，打印彩色矩阵。无需安装，用内置 echo fixture 三条命令复现首个绿矩阵。
body.en: npx mcp-conform run takes the full command for how you start your own server, spawns it over stdio JSON-RPC, runs the initialize handshake and tools/list checks, and prints a colored matrix. No install — three commands to a first green matrix with the built-in echo fixture.

body.zh: 核心 primitive 是一张以 (client, axis, check_id) 为键的类型化报告：axis ∈ {behavior, auth}，status ∈ {pass, fail, skip, n/a}，失败时带上具体断言名。今天没有别的工具能在单张类型化报告里断言「跨客户端行为一致」。
body.en: The core primitive is a typed report keyed by (client, axis, check_id): axis ∈ {behavior, auth}, status ∈ {pass, fail, skip, n/a}, and a fail carries the exact assertion name. Nothing else today asserts "cross-client behavior parity" in a single typed report.

title.zh: 活体 Zero-Touch OAuth 探测

body.zh: --base-url <url> 让 auth 列从 stdio 的 skip 变成真实 pass/fail：对 HTTP 资源跑 Protected Resource Metadata 与 WWW-Authenticate Bearer challenge 的活体 discovery 探测。v0.1 写了校验形状但 CLI 从未把 base URL 接进去——v0.2 补上了。
body.en: --base-url <url> turns the auth column from a stdio skip into a real pass/fail: it runs a live discovery probe of Protected Resource Metadata and the WWW-Authenticate Bearer challenge against an HTTP resource. v0.1 shipped the check shape but the CLI never wired a base URL into it — v0.2 closes that gap.

body.zh: --badge 写出 badge.svg + badge.json 贴进 README，--report 写完整 report.json，--json 打印稳定类型化矩阵供 CI 断言。任意 fail 退出 1（CI 红），n/a 与 skip 不让 CI 失败。
body.en: --badge writes badge.svg + badge.json to drop into your README, --report writes the full report.json, and --json prints a stable typed matrix for CI assertion. Any fail exits 1 (CI red); n/a and skip never fail CI.

headline.zh: 把「在 Cursor 能跑、在 Claude Code 不行」的传闻，变成一张可发布的矩阵
headline.en: Turn "works in Cursor, not Claude Code" hearsay into a publishable matrix

sub.zh: 开源、MIT、无付费墙。中立跨厂商一致性，没有哪个客户端厂商能独占。
sub.en: Open source, MIT, no paywall. Neutral cross-vendor parity no single client can own.

tag.zh: 中立的跨客户端 MCP 一致性校验工具
tag.en: The neutral cross-client MCP conformance harness
